disambiguated.context: I've been writing to two pen pals, one is Guinean and the other is Palestinian. The Guinean one comes from an area without a lot of resources and often tells me about how poor his family is, while the Palestinian one writes to me about his exciting travels, so I know his financial situation is much better.
disambiguated.question: Who has sufficient money?
